docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $225.00 FILED BY BALINTON ANTHONY A MINOR BY AND THR HIS GUARDIAN BELL LORRAINE MOTHER AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM AS TO DEFENDANT BUNKER DANIEL W INDDBA GROUP MODELS AND TALENT AGY CARROLL PATRICIA A INDDBA GROUP MODELS TALENT AGNY TAYLOR ANNE IN DBA GROUP MODELS AND TALENT AGENCY ALL DEFENDANTS AKA  METROPOLITAN CHILDRN COMMERCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-07-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF SEP-27-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALL DEFENDANTS AKA  METROPOLITAN CHILDRN COMMERCIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CARROLL PATRICIA A INDDBA GROUP MODELS TALENT AGNY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALINTON ANTHONY A MINOR BY AND THR HIS GUARDIAN BELL LORRAINE MOTHER AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARROLL PATRICIA A INDDBA GROUP MODELS TALENT AGNY TAYLOR ANNE IN DBA GROUP MODELS AND TALENT AGENCY ALL DEFENDANTS AKA  METROPOLITAN CHILDRN COMMERCIA $225.00 PRINCIPAL, $138.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $363.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
